case_title: HUAN XIONG MA VS. IVY YOO LAN LAI ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, HUAN XIONG AS TO DEFENDANT LAI, IVY YOO LAN INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA IVY FOOD AND TRADING CO. AND IVY EXQUISITE FOOD CO. WAN, ALLAN SAI LUN INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA IVY FOOD AND TRADING CO. AND IVY EXQUISITE FOOD CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, HUAN XIONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAI, IVY YOO LAN INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA IVY FOOD AND TRADING CO. AND IVY EXQUISITE FOOD CO. WAN, ALLAN SAI LUN INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA IVY FOOD AND TRADING CO. AND IVY EXQUISITE FOOD CO. $88,546.94 PRINCIPAL, $14,063.69 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $103,060.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
